rule: This gate defines the expansion protocol but authorizes no collection or backtest by itself.
Expanded panel has at least 30 admissible PIT events and passes negative retention delisted mapping and attrition logging checks.
Panel has useful events but fails minimum count or retention constraints.
Panel cannot prove PIT dates or produces success-only biased coverage.
Only after EXPANSION_PASS may the lab create a separate micro-backtest rerun gate.
